headline: Bernstein Remains Bullish On HCA Healthcare (HCA); Projects EBITDA Growth Of 2.8% and 4.6% in 2026 And 2027
summary: HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA), with a forward P/E of 12.27 and upside potential of 38.4%, is among the top 10 lowest forward P/E stocks in the S&P 500. HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE:HCA) is navigating a cautious macro backdrop for healthcare while continuing to invest in long-term workforce development. On June 4, 2026, Bernstein lowered its […]

headline: HCA Healthcare Expands Into Education And India As Valuation Gap Widens
summary: HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) has agreed to acquire The College of Health Care Professions, expanding directly into healthcare education. The company is also building out a new India office, with plans to hire 3,000 employees by year end. These moves come as HCA Healthcare works to address staffing needs through both education and offshore recruitment. HCA Healthcare, trading at around $373.34, is addressing workforce challenges with a mix of education initiatives and international hiring. The...
